sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Paycom declares $0.375 dividend
feed.summary: Paycom has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.375 per share.

feed.title: Analysts Reiterate Bullish Outlook on Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) Following Kelonia Acquisition
feed.summary: Following Eli Lilly and Company's (LLY) acquisition of Kelonia Therapeutics, analysts have reiterated a bullish outlook on the stock. Barclays maintained an Overweight rating with a $1,350 price target, while Scotiabank reiterated an Outperform rating with a $1,300 price target. The acquisition is seen as a strategic move to strengthen Eli Lilly's oncology pipeline, contributing to an average "Strong Buy" rating and 42% upside potential for the stock.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH) Beats Wall Street’s Q1 Revenue and Earnings Estimates
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH) surpassed Wall Street's Q1 2026 revenue and earnings estimates, reporting $111.7 billion in revenue and adjusted EPS of $7.23. The company also raised its annual profit guidance for 2026 to $18.25 per share and announced the acquisition of healthcare technology platform Alegeus Technologies. Wall Street currently maintains a "Moderate Buy" rating on UNH stock with a 7% average share price upside potential.

feed.title: Is Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) Among the Best Big Name Stocks to Buy?
feed.summary: Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) is considered a Strong Buy by analysts, with a 10% upside potential and positive sentiment from hedge funds. Recent analyst ratings from Mizuho, J.P. Morgan, and Wells Fargo maintain Outperform/Overweight ratings with price targets ranging from $430 to $500. The company also expanded its partnership with Google Cloud for network insights.

feed.title: Tech Job Cuts: Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) Offers Voluntary Buyouts To Employees
feed.summary: Microsoft Corporation is offering voluntary buyouts to approximately 7% of its workforce, targeting senior directors and employees meeting specific age and tenure criteria, marking a first for the company. This move comes amidst ongoing tech industry job cuts and increased AI spending. Despite these internal changes, analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating on MSFT, with Guggenheim recently reiterating a Buy rating and Citigroup adjusting its price target while keeping a Buy rating.

feed.title: Wall Street Bullish on Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) with Strong Buy
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts maintain a bullish outlook on Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) with a Strong Buy rating and an average upside potential of 9%. Oppenheimer recently raised its price target to $275, citing a positive trajectory for AWS, while UBS increased its target to $304 due to momentum from deals with Anthropic and OpenAI. Amazon also secured a multi-year, multi-billion-dollar deal with Meta to provide AWS's Graviton5 CPU chips, further solidifying its market position.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Verisk Analytics (VRSK) After This Year’s Sharp Share Price Slide
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) shares have seen a significant decline this year, down 20.9% year to date and 38.9% over the past year. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis by Simply Wall St suggests the stock is undervalued by 26.7% at its current price of US$174.90, with an estimated intrinsic value of $238.53 per share, while a Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio comparison indicates it might be slightly overvalued compared to its "Fair Ratio." The article provides a detailed valuation, noting that investors are reassessing data and analytics businesses.

feed.title: Alpha & Omega Semiconductor Opens with 8.0% Gain, Outperforming S&P 500's 0.8% Increase
feed.summary: Alpha & Omega Semiconductor Ltd. has experienced a significant stock surge, opening with an 8.0% gain and outperforming the S&P 500 across various time frames. Despite this current positive movement, the company faces financial challenges, including a 61.78% decline in pre-tax profit for the most recent quarter and negative results for the past two consecutive quarters, contributing to a year-over-year loss. Technical indicators present a mixed picture, with some showing bullish trends and others indicating a mildly bearish outlook.

feed.title: Linde, Amazon, and Pure One: The New Alliance Against Fossil Fuel Dependency
feed.summary: This article examines how Linde, Amazon, and Pure One are spearheading the hydrogen transition to reduce global dependence on fossil fuels. Linde is highlighted as a market leader in hydrogen infrastructure with strong financial performance, while Amazon drives demand through its massive energy needs and strategic partnerships. Pure One offers specialized solutions for green commercial vehicles, targeting decentralized mobility and planning expansion into the US market, presenting an interesting opportunity for speculative investors.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Co. Hits 52-Week Low at $36.60 Amid Market Struggles
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Co. (TSCO) has reached a new 52-week low of $36.60, marking a significant 32.86% decline over the past year, in contrast to the S&P 500's gain. Despite this stock performance, the company maintains a strong market capitalization of $28,717 million, robust financial metrics including a 42.46% return on equity and a low debt-to-equity ratio, and 100% institutional holdings. The article highlights the stock's volatility while acknowledging its underlying financial strength.

feed.title: Is Apple Inc. (AAPL) the Best Big Name Stock to Buy?
feed.summary: Apple Inc. (AAPL) has received mixed analyst ratings following news of its CEO Tim Cook stepping down, with John Ternus taking over. While Rosenblatt maintained a "Neutral" rating with a $268 price target, Wedbush reiterated its "Outperform" rating at $350, acknowledging potential investor reactions to the leadership change, especially as Apple makes advancements in AI. The company is currently rated a "Moderate Buy" by analysts, with an average upside potential of 11% based on recommendations from 27 analysts.

feed.title: A Look At Waste Management (WM) Valuation As Earnings Approach After Prior Revenue And Income Miss
feed.summary: Waste Management (WM) is approaching its earnings report after missing revenue and adjusted operating income estimates in the previous quarter. The stock has seen a modest 3.57% year-to-date return, but strong long-term shareholder returns. While a narrative-based valuation suggests WM is 10.6% undervalued, its P/E ratio of 33.7x is higher than the industry average and its own fair ratio, raising valuation concerns.

feed.title: A Look At Duke Energy (DUK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Strength
feed.summary: Duke Energy (DUK) has seen recent share price strength, closing at $127.09, and analysts project a fair value of $139.82, suggesting it's 9.1% undervalued due to infrastructure investments and improved operational efficiency. However, Simply Wall St's DCF model indicates the stock is overvalued at $78.25, highlighting a discrepancy in valuation methods. Investors are advised to consider both narratives and underlying data before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Semiconductor Sector Spotlight with ASE Technology on ASX 200 Radar
feed.summary: This article highlights ASE Technology Holding's presence on the ASX 200 radar, noting its strong momentum within the semiconductor sector, elevated valuation metrics, and active trading patterns. The company operates in the semiconductor sector, specializing in assembly and testing services for advanced chips. The significance of the semiconductor sector in the ASX market is emphasized due to its crucial role in modern technology infrastructure.

feed.title: Yunhong Green CTI Appoints Fred Chak as Board Chairman
feed.summary: Yunhong Green CTI announced the appointment of Fred H.F. Chak as its new Board Chairman, effective April 27, 2026. This move is a planned transition, with former interim chairman Gerald D. Roberts Jr. remaining on the board as a director. TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates YHGJ as Neutral due to persistent losses and weak operating cash flow, despite a strong revenue rebound in 2025.

feed.title: Kroger Wellness Festival morphs into tour. Will it include Cincinnati?
feed.summary: Kroger is transforming its annual Wellness Festival into a multi-city "Wellness Tour" for 2026, with initial stops planned for Nashville, Houston, Phoenix, and Salt Lake City. Notably, Cincinnati, which hosted the festival since 2018, is not listed as a "premium wellness celebration location," though the company stated Cincinnati will have in-store activations. The article also mentions the festival's past celebrity appearances and a lawsuit filed by singer Jewel against Kroger.

feed.title: Volkswagen, Colgate, Apple: The return of the ‘agency within an agency’
feed.summary: The "agency within an agency" model, where dedicated teams are built around large clients, is resurfacing in the advertising industry. This approach, exemplified by Omnicom's Bernbach for Volkswagen, aims to provide global brands with consistency while allowing for local nuance and sharper integration amid increasing complexity and consolidation. However, the model faces challenges related to talent retention, cost-effectiveness, and the risk of stagnation or overdependence if not carefully managed and evolved over time.

feed.title: Introducing IBM Bob: AI Development Partner that Takes Enterprises from AI-Assisted Coding to Production-Ready Software
feed.summary: IBM has launched "IBM Bob," an AI-first development partner designed to automate the entire software development lifecycle for enterprises. Over 80,000 IBM employees are already using Bob, reporting an average productivity gain of 45%. The platform offers multi-model orchestration, built-in security, and auditability, and is available as a SaaS offering with a complimentary 30-day trial.

feed.title: Applied Finance Valuation Large Cap ETF (VSLU) Stock Price, Holdings, Dividend Yield
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed overview of the Applied Finance Valuation Large Cap ETF (VSLU), including its current stock price ($45.315), PE Ratio (25.16), PB Ratio (5.92), Dividend Yield (0.45%), and top holdings. As of its latest N-PORT filing on 2025-12-31, VSLU holds 590 stocks with a total portfolio value of $384.00 million, and a turnover rate of 23%. The top holdings include Apple Inc (AAPL), NVIDIA Corp (NVDA), and Alphabet Inc (GOOGL).

feed.title: P&G Beauty’s SK Lee on the Power of Decisiveness
feed.summary: SK Lee, President of P&G skin care, emphasizes decisiveness and authenticity as key to her 30-year career success and leadership philosophy. The 2026 CEW Achiever Award honoree explains that her journey has been shaped by a series of choices and a continuous pursuit of learning, which allows her to cultivate the next generation of leaders by encouraging them to lead as themselves.

feed.title: Wipro Ltd. Upgraded to Hold by MarketsMOJO Amid Mixed Financial and Technical Signals
feed.summary: MarketsMOJO has upgraded Wipro Ltd.'s investment rating from Sell to Hold, citing a nuanced reassessment of its fundamentals and technical outlook. This upgrade is driven by the company's strong management efficiency, net-debt-free balance sheet, and an attractive dividend yield, despite flat financial performance and long-term growth challenges. The report suggests Wipro is a cautious holding due to its premium valuation and subdued earnings growth, but its resilience and improving technical signals offer stability for investors.

feed.title: Incransom Strikes Pneutronics, a Division of Parker Hannifin
feed.summary: The Incransom ransomware group has claimed responsibility for a cyberattack on Pneutronics, a division of Parker Hannifin Corporation, on April 27, 2026. The group threatened to leak sensitive data if negotiations were not initiated. DeXpose recommends continuous monitoring, compromise assessments, backup validation, threat intelligence integration, hardened employee defenses, and engagement of professional response teams to mitigate such threats.

feed.title: John Fetterman's Micron Stock Bet Surges 61%, Notes Popular Nancy Pelosi Tracker: 'This Is Suspect'
feed.summary: A popular stock tracker, known for following Nancy Pelosi's trades, highlighted concerns over Senator John Fetterman's well-timed purchase of Micron Technology Inc. shares. Fetterman bought Micron stock on March 30, coinciding with a short-term bottom for the semiconductor company, leading to a reported 61% surge in his investment. The tracker also noted that Micron received a significant award from the CHIPS Act, an act overseen by the Commerce Committee, on which Fetterman serves.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences snaps six straight sessions of losses
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences Inc. (GILD) saw its stock price increase by 0.94% today, breaking a six-day losing streak that resulted in a 3.32% decline over the past week. The company's positive performance comes despite a negative broader market trend, with the S&P 500 falling 0.04%.

feed.title: Tuya Inc. Announces Board Meeting and Quarterly Earnings Call for Q1 2026
feed.summary: Tuya Inc. has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on May 11, 2026, to approve the unaudited quarterly results for Q1 2026. The company will release these results and host an earnings call on May 12, 2026 (Hong Kong Time) to discuss its financial performance and provide insights. This event is considered price-sensitive, and shareholders are encouraged to monitor disclosures and participate in the earnings call.

Peers like Lam Research and Amkor have already reported strong Q1 results, providing a hint for KLA's upcoming report.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Citigroup (C) After A 94% One Year Share Price Surge?
feed.summary: Despite a 94% share price surge over the last year, Citigroup (C) appears undervalued according to two valuation models. The Excess Returns model suggests it's 30.3% undervalued with an intrinsic value of US$185.34 per share, while the P/E ratio, though higher than industry averages, is below Simply Wall St’s Fair Ratio of 21.44x. The article further explores bullish and bearish narratives, with fair value estimates ranging from US$112.86 to US$233.04 depending on underlying assumptions.

The stock is currently trading at US$26.79, appearing undervalued according to some analysts with a fair value target of $30.62, but carries risks like high debt and potential dividend cuts.

feed.title: AbbVie (ABBV) To Report Earnings Tomorrow: Here Is What To Expect

Analysts have shown increased bullishness on revenue estimates over the last 30 days, reflecting AbbVie's history of exceeding expectations, despite its stock being down 7% over the last month while the biotechnology sector is up 11% on average.

authors: Simply Wall St Reviewed by Bailey Pemberton

feed.title: Textron Aviation expands High‑Speed Cabin connectivity with Gogo 5G upgrade for Cessna Citation Business Jets

This aftermarket solution is available for various Citation models through Textron Aviation Service Centers, with plans to expand to more models soon. The upgrade aims to provide essential high-speed connectivity for business and passenger needs in flight.

feed.title: ADT Inc. Data Breach: Edelson Lechtzin LLP Launches Investigation Into Exposure of Personal Information
feed.summary: Edelson Lechtzin LLP is investigating a potential class action lawsuit following a data breach at ADT Inc. The breach, discovered on April 20, 2026, by hacker group ShinyHunters, exposed personal information including names, phone numbers, addresses, dates of birth, and the last four digits of some customers' Social Security numbers. The law firm is offering free case evaluations to individuals affected by the incident.

The company reported a beat on revenue and EPS estimates last quarter but missed full-year EPS guidance. Peer performance in the healthcare sector has shown mixed results, while investor sentiment for the segment has been positive.

feed.title: [6-K] TFI International Inc. Current Report (Foreign Issuer) | TFII SEC Filing - Form 6-K
feed.summary: TFI International Inc. held its annual shareholder meeting on April 27, 2026, where all nine nominated directors were elected with strong majority support. Shareholders also approved the appointment of Deloitte LLP as auditor and an advisory "say on pay" resolution for executive compensation, indicating broad backing for the company’s governance and pay practices. The company filed this Form 6-K to report these voting results to the SEC.

feed.title: Urgent recall of dumbbells sold at US Walmart stores after 115 incidents reported
feed.summary: Tzumi Electronics has recalled 50,000 FitRx SmartBell Quick-Select Adjustable Dumbbells sold at Walmart due to 115 reports of weight plates dislodging and six reported injuries. Customers are advised to mark their product as "Recalled" and register on the FitRx website for a free replacement. This recall follows other recent product recalls, including heated socks and stainless steel sauté pans.

feed.title: Cisco’s Universal Quantum Switch and the rise of the quantum fabric
feed.summary: Cisco's new Universal Quantum Switch signifies a critical shift in quantum computing from isolated hardware to an interconnected fabric, allowing distributed quantum processors to function as a single logical machine. This switch, which routes entangled photons at room temperature over standard telecom fiber, addresses the scaling challenge of quantum systems and positions Cisco as a key enabler of heterogeneous quantum data centers and quantum-enhanced classical applications. IT leaders are advised to prepare for this future by treating quantum as a multivendor, networked service and building quantum-literate teams.

feed.title: Verisk (VRSK) Q1 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
feed.summary: Verisk (VRSK) is set to report its Q1 earnings, with analysts expecting a 2.6% year-on-year revenue growth, a slowdown from the previous year. The company has a history of missing Wall Street's revenue estimates, and its stock is currently down 5.3% over the last month, contrasting with a positive sentiment in the broader professional services segment. Investors will be watching how Verisk performs given its mixed past results and declining share price relative to peers.

feed.title: ADP Earnings: What To Look For From ADP
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) is set to announce its earnings, with analysts anticipating a 5.4% year-on-year revenue growth. The company has a history of surpassing Wall Street expectations, and despite some peers experiencing share price drops after their Q1 results, professional services stocks have seen positive sentiment. Investors will be keen to see if ADP continues its trend of strong performance against analyst targets.
